name: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
notes: Next-Gen update uses DX12/VKD3D. Ray tracing via vkd3d_dxr works well on both AMD and NVIDIA. CD Projekt Red launcher can be safely bypassed with --launcher-skip. AMD: RADV ICD + RT perftest flags required for RT, FSR4 available on RDNA4 hardware. NVIDIA: NVAPI enables DLSS and RT integration.
